nodes.title: Start Dev Server
nodes.description: POST /api/devserver/start with {worktreePath, command, port}. Starts dev server in tmux session. Returns {pid, session, url}. Returns 400 if server already running.

nodes.title: Stop Dev Server
nodes.description: POST /api/devserver/stop with {worktreePath}. Kills dev server process. Returns {stopped: true}. No error if not running.

nodes.title: Restart Dev Server
nodes.description: POST /api/devserver/restart with {worktreePath}. Stops then starts dev server. Returns {restarted: true, newPid}. Preserves port configuration.

nodes.title: Get Server Status
nodes.description: GET /api/devserver/status/:worktreePath. Returns {running: boolean, pid, port, uptime, url}. Returns 404 if never started.

nodes.title: Monitor Server Health
nodes.description: On interval while server running. Pings server URL to check health. Returns {healthy: boolean, responseTime}. Updates status indicator in UI.
